en_title: Resident Evil Series May Finally Set Future Game in Japan, Producer Says
cn_title: 《生化危机》系列或将首次以日本为舞台
subtitle: 终于回家了？
opus_summary: 《生化危机》系列制作人熊泽真人透露，未来正传作品可能首次将舞台设在日本。尽管尚未确认，但这一想法已在开发团队中讨论多年。去年《寂静岭f》将背景设定在1960年代日本，引发玩家对《生化危机》日本篇的期待。熊泽同时强调，《生化危机：安魂曲》并非系列终点，卡普空将继续探索新创意。

paragraphs.en: The Resident Evil series may set a future installment in Japan — a setting no mainline game has visited to date.
paragraphs.cn: 《生化危机》系列未来作品或将首次以日本为舞台——迄今为止，尚无任何正传作品涉足这一设定。

paragraphs.en: While no new game in Japan has yet been confirmed, Resident Evil Requiem producer Masato Kumazawa has discussed the possibility of a fresh title exploring the series' homeland in a new interview, sparking discussions among fans about what such a game might look like.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然尚未确认任何以日本为背景的新作，但《生化危机：安魂曲》制作人熊泽真人在一次新采访中探讨了推出探索系列故乡的新作的可能性，引发了粉丝们对这样一款游戏会是什么样子的讨论。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Japanese outlet Futaman , in remarks translated by IGN, Kumazawa said that a Japan-set Resident Evil game had been thought about. "I think that every Japanese Resident Evil fan has definitely thought about a Japan setting, and I’ve also considered it myself," Kumaza said. "As the series is primarily developed by staff in Japan, I think everyone on the dev team has probably thought about it. Even though Japan hasn’t appeared as a setting for the games yet, I think it might at some point in the future."
paragraphs.cn: 在接受日本媒体Futaman采访（由IGN翻译）时，熊泽表示，以日本为背景的《生化危机》游戏已被考虑过。他说：「我认为每个日本《生化危机》粉丝肯定都想过日本背景，我自己也考虑过。由于该系列主要由日本员工开发，我想开发团队中的每个人都可能想过。虽然日本尚未作为游戏背景出现，但我认为未来某个时候可能会。」

paragraphs.en: While the Resident Evil series has primarily been set in the US, it has also explored fictional places in other parts of the world, such as Resident Evil Village’s Eastern European setting and Resident Evil 5’s controversial foray into West Africa. However, we have never seen Umbrella Corp’s impact on Japan.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《生化危机》系列主要设定在美国，但也探索过世界其他地区的虚构地点，例如《生化危机：村庄》的东欧背景和《生化危机5》备受争议的西非之旅。然而，我们从未见过安布雷拉公司对日本的影响。

paragraphs.en: Silent Hill f transported Konami’s iconic horror series to 1960s Japan last year, kicking off some discussions on Reddit and other forums as to why Japan’s other major survival horror franchise hadn’t gone for a Japan setting yet. Although there has been some enthusiasm for a Resident Evil set in Japan among Japanese-speaking commenters, many hope that such a game would steer away from a traditional village setting, which has already been done by many other Japanese horror games such as Silent Hill f, Fatal Frame and Siren.
paragraphs.cn: 去年，《寂静岭f》将科乐美的标志性恐怖系列带到了1960年代的日本，引发了Reddit等论坛上的讨论：为什么日本另一大生存恐怖系列还没有采用日本背景？尽管日语评论者中对《生化危机》日本篇有些热情，但许多人希望这样的游戏能避开传统的村庄设定——这一设定已被《寂静岭f》、《零》和《死魂曲》等许多其他日本恐怖游戏采用。

paragraphs.en: On the flip side, some fans have pointed out that Japan has potential as a setting, considering all the small islands that could inspire in-game locations for a virus outbreak.
paragraphs.cn: 另一方面，一些粉丝指出，日本作为背景具有潜力，考虑到众多小岛可以激发游戏中病毒爆发地点的灵感。

paragraphs.en: Reacting to Kumazawa’s comment, some Japanese fans pointed out that Capcom’s survival horror franchise has had a Japanese main character before, but in a spin-off only released in Japan.
paragraphs.cn: 对于熊泽的评论，一些日本粉丝指出，卡普空的生存恐怖系列此前已有日本主角，但仅出现在日本独占的衍生作品中。

paragraphs.en: Takeru Tominaga is the protagonist of the official Resident Evil manga Biohazard Heavenly Island. He’s the assistant director of Idol Survival, a reality TV show featuring bikini-clad models on a Caribbean island that just so happens to be the former site of an Umbrella Corp lab (what could possibly go wrong?). Soon, he and the remaining contestants and crew are fighting a very different battle against the zombifying T-virus. "Even if it’s difficult for them to make a Resident Evil set in Japan, a Japanese protagonist might be possible," mused a user on X. The games also have a few Japanese or half Japanese characters including Resident Evil Outbreak’s Yoko Suzuki and, of course, Jill Valentine.
paragraphs.cn: 富永丈是官方《生化危机》漫画《生化危机：天堂岛》的主角。他是真人秀《偶像生存》的助理导演，该节目在加勒比海的一个小岛上拍摄，身着比基尼的模特们恰好身处安布雷拉公司实验室旧址（还能出什么岔子呢？）。很快，他和剩下的参赛者及工作人员开始与僵尸化的T病毒展开一场截然不同的战斗。一位X用户沉思道：「即使他们很难制作一款以日本为背景的《生化危机》，但日本主角或许可行。」游戏中还有几位日本或混血角色，包括《生化危机：爆发》的铃木阳子，当然还有吉尔·瓦伦蒂安。

paragraphs.en: Kumazawa also assured fans that, despite its final-sounding title, Resident Evil Requiem would by no means be an end to the series. Although Resident Evil Requiem does wrap up or pay tribute to some of Resident Evil’s iconic elements ("It’s a Requiem for Leon’s battles against bioterrorism, and a requiem for the past Raccoon City incident"), Kumazawa added that "There are still many things we'd like to do, such as telling the stories of characters that didn’t appear in Requiem.”
paragraphs.cn: 熊泽还向粉丝保证，尽管《生化危机：安魂曲》的标题听起来像是终结，但它绝不是系列的终点。虽然《生化危机：安魂曲》确实收尾或致敬了《生化危机》的一些标志性元素（「这是对里昂反生物恐怖主义战斗的安魂曲，也是对过去浣熊市事件的安魂曲」），但熊泽补充道：「我们还有很多想做的事情，比如讲述未在《安魂曲》中出现的角色的故事。」

paragraphs.en: He also says future Resident Evil games will "preserve the core elements of the series" and stay true to established characters and settings, while experimenting with different ideas. "Players will get bored if we just keep making the same kind of games, so we'd like to continue taking on new challenges." He gives Village's Megamycete concept and Requiem’s POV switching as examples of new ideas the dev team has tried out to keep the series fresh.
paragraphs.cn: 他还表示，未来的《生化危机》游戏将「保留系列核心元素」，忠于既定角色和设定，同时尝试不同的创意。「如果我们一直制作同类型的游戏，玩家会感到厌倦，所以我们希望继续迎接新挑战。」他以《村庄》的巨霉菌概念和《安魂曲》的视角切换为例，说明开发团队为保持系列新鲜感而尝试的新想法。

paragraphs.en: As for what's next for Capcom’s survival horror series, Kumazawa hopes fans are looking forward to the upcoming Resident Evil Requiem story expansion. Meanwhile, Resident Evil is getting a new movie set in Raccoon City, which will hit theaters this September.
paragraphs.cn: 至于卡普空生存恐怖系列的下一步，熊泽希望粉丝们期待即将到来的《生化危机：安魂曲》故事扩展包。与此同时，《生化危机》还将推出一部以浣熊市为背景的新电影，将于今年9月上映。

paragraphs.en: Verity Townsend is a Japan-based freelance writer who previously served as editor, contributor and translator for the game news site Automaton West. She has also written about Japanese culture and movies for various publications.
paragraphs.cn: Verity Townsend是一位常驻日本的自由撰稿人，曾担任游戏新闻网站Automaton West的编辑、撰稿人和翻译。她还为多家媒体撰写过关于日本文化和电影的文章。

pending_dict.reason: 媒体名称，无官方中文名
